provisions.content:
PROFESSJONI TAL-ACCOUNTANCY (GENERAL ACCOUNTING
[ L.S.281.05
PRINCIPLES FOR SMALL AND MEDIUM-SIZED ENTITIES)

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 281.05
REGOLAMENTI DWAR IL-PROFESSJONI
TAL-ACCOUNTANCY (GENERAL ACCOUNTING
PRINCIPLES FOR SMALL AND MEDIUM-SIZED
ENTITIES)*
28 ta’ Awwissu, 2015
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 289 tal-2015, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 41 tal-2024.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
